ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that produced the recording */,
  "matrix_number" TEXT /* Matrix number of the recording */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the recording (e.g., 10-in., 12-in.) */,
  "first_recording_date" TEXT /* Date of the first recording */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the recording */,
  "copyright_date" TEXT /* Date of copyright */,
  "record_label" TEXT /* Label of the recording */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number of the recording */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES producers ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "instrument" TEXT /* Instrument played by the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_artists" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role played by the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id", "artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_artists_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_files" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the audio file in MB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the audio file */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_files_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, producer, artist) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the recording */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the recording was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., playback, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the recording was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres_recordings" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id", "recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles_recordings" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* ID of the style */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id", "recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording that received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording being reviewed */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)
column_names: ID of the company that produced the recording
ID of the role played by the artist
Unique identifier for each audio file
ID of the recording the file belongs to
File path to the audio file
Size of the audio file in MB
Role of the user (e.g., administrator, producer, artist)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the recording being accessed
ID of the user accessing the recording
Date when the recording was accessed
Time when the recording was accessed
ID of the recording that received the award
ID of the recording being reviewed
